Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

items.name: Child Development Department Hathras – Anganwadi Worker – 229 Posts

basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Apply Online for 229 Posts in Hathras District
basic_details.short_information: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Get latest UP Anganwadi recruitment notification 2026 for 229 Anganwadi Worker vacancies in Hathras District. Apply online from 18 May 2026 to 4 June 2026 through the official UP Anganwadi career portal.
basic_details.organization_name: Bal Vikas Pariyojana (Child Development Project), Hathras (8 Projects)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only at http://upanganwadibharti.in (no offline / postal applications accepted)

age_limit.age_details: Age relaxation as per UP Government rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Widow/Divorced candidates - check official advertisement for specific relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum: Intermediate (10+2) or equivalent. Maximum qualification considered: Post Graduation (Parasnaatak). Merit is prepared based on combined marks from Intermediate + Graduation + Post Graduation (all examinations). Candidates must fill marks for all examinations (Intermediate, Graduation, Post Graduation) at the time of application.

selection_process: Merit-based on combined marks of Intermediate + Graduation + Post Graduation (combined total). Tie-break: higher age, then higher educational qualification.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the UP Anganwadi Bharti portal (http://upanganwadibharti.in) only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Applications must be submitted within 21 days of the official advertisement publication date. The application form must be filled correctly and completely in the format available on the departmental website. Self-attested, clean, and legible copies of all documents mentioned in the application must be uploaded. Any error, incorrect data, or forged/fabricated documents will result in cancellation of candidature.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 – Walk-in Interview on 30 May
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur) Recruitment 2026 for 27 posts of Senior Resident. Candidates with MS/MD Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in on 30-05-2026. For detailed information please visit AIIMS Gorakhpur official website, aiimsgorakhpur.edu.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MS/MD

how_to_apply: Download the Application Form (Annexure I) and Bio-Data Form (Annexure II) from the official website aiimsgorakhpur.edu.in.
Fill in the application form completely in block letters and affix a recent passport-size photograph (self-attested).
Pay the application fee via NEFT and note the transaction ID and date in the form.
Prepare self-attested photocopies of all required documents (degree certificates, mark sheets, age proof, caste certificate, registration certificate, etc.).
Candidates applying for more than one department must submit separate applications with separate fee for each post.

Report in person at the Administrative Block, AIIMS Campus, Kunraghat, Gorakhpur between 09:30 AM and 11:30 AM on 30 May 2026 with filled application, bio-data, originals + self-attested copies of all documents, and fee payment receipt.
Candidates currently in Central/State/Semi-Government/Autonomous Institution service must bring a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer.

Preferential Qualification (any one of the following): (One) Served in the Territorial Army for a minimum period of two years, OR (Two) Obtained "B" Certificate of National Cadet Corps (NCC), OR (Three) Obtained a certificate in Computer Application from a Central or State Government recognised institution, OR (Four) Represented the State in any sport/game.
how_to_apply: The application process for UPSSSC Forest Guard and Wildlife Guard Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Applications submitted through any other medium will not be accepted. Candidates must read the complete official notification carefully before filling out the application form. All steps of the application process can be completed in one sitting. The step-by-step process to apply online is given below.

basic_details.job_title: UPSSSC Sugarcane Supervisor Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1182 Posts
basic_details.short_information: UPSSSC Sugarcane Supervisor Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 1182 vacancies across Uttar Pradesh. Candidates with B.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-07-2026, and closes on 28-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UPSSSC website, upsssc.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Ganna Adhisthan and Chini Adhisthan, Govt. of Uttar Pradesh

qualification.education_qualification: Details

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-4; Minimum Pay: Rs. 25,500/- | Maximum Pay: Rs. 81,100/-

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the UPSSSC Online Application System at the official website https://upsssc.gov.in. Hard copy/offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. Candidates must login using their PET-2025 Registration Number via OTP sent to their registered mobile/email. All personal information filled during PET-2025 (name, father's name, category, EWS, reservation details, DOB, gender, marital status, contact number, email etc.) will be pre-filled and auto-displayed - these cannot be modified. Candidates must fill in educational qualification details in Section-II of the application. After filling all sections and entering the Verification Code, clicking "Submit" will display the Application Form with an 11-digit registration number - candidates must take a printout and keep it safely. The application form correction window will be open up to 04-08-2026.
seo_tags: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission Sugarcane Supervisor Recruitment 2026
